code: import*as yup from'yup';export var initialValues={day:"",time_from:"",time_to:"",comment:""};export var validationSchema=yup.object({day:yup.mixed().required("From day is required"),time_from:yup.string().required("Please select time."),time_to:yup.string().required("Please select time."),comment:yup.string()});
